hooks.command: /bin/sh -lc 'root="${COMMON_AI_AGENT_ROOT:-$PWD}"; while [ "$root" != "/" ] && [ ! -f "$root/scripts/ip_dev_memory.py" ]; do root="$(dirname "$root")"; done; exec /usr/bin/python3 "$root/scripts/ip_dev_memory.py" hook-session --surface codex'

/bin/sh -lc 'root="${COMMON_AI_AGENT_ROOT:-$PWD}"; while [ "$root" != "/" ] && [ ! -f "$root/scripts/ip_dev_memory.py" ]; do root="$(dirname "$root")"; done; exec /usr/bin/python3 "$root/scripts/ip_dev_memory.py" hook-session --surface codex'

/bin/sh -lc 'root="${COMMON_AI_AGENT_ROOT:-$PWD}"; while [ "$root" != "/" ] && [ ! -f "$root/scripts/ip_dev_memory.py" ]; do root="$(dirname "$root")"; done; exec /usr/bin/python3 "$root/scripts/ip_dev_memory.py" hook-file-edit --surface codex'

/bin/sh -lc 'root="${COMMON_AI_AGENT_ROOT:-$PWD}"; while [ "$root" != "/" ] && [ ! -f "$root/scripts/ip_dev_memory.py" ]; do root="$(dirname "$root")"; done; exec /usr/bin/python3 "$root/scripts/ip_dev_memory.py" hook-stop --surface codex'
